creator: cagney@tpgi.com.au
text:
The installation doesn't include /usr/doc (Perhaphs I'm wrong).
	It is certainly not in the `doc' set of files.

Fix: 

Fortunatly CD-2 - full file system contains the source files.

	o	install sgmlformat package (correct name)

	o	Mount the second CD onto /cdrom

	o	copy /cdrom/usr/doc to /usr/doc

	o	cd to /usr/doc and build it all
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install from scratch.
